summary: Markets are mixed amid US-Iran Hormuz tensions boosting oil and gold safe-haven demand, while equities flash overbought warnings and crypto holds structural bids ahead of key US CPI data. Brent crude and gasoline setups remain bullish on geopolitical risks, but S&P/NASDAQ risk pullbacks. Bitcoin shows whale accumulation strength despite macro uncertainties.
